title: Policy
description: Defines the rules used to govern candidate evaluation and promotion.

id.description: Unique identifier for this policy document.

allowed_adapters.description: Adapter identifiers permitted under this policy.

required_evaluators.description: Evaluator identifiers that must run before promotion is eligible.

resource_limits.description: Resource limit identifiers enforced by this policy.

promotion_thresholds.description: Promotion threshold identifiers that must be satisfied.

prohibited_bypass_flags.description: Bypass flags that are prohibited under this policy.
